entries.summary: Phase 5: 11 test quality tasks completed. 9 ALIGNED, 2 MINOR_DRIFT (acceptable implementation variations). Fixed path traversal test verification, vector store behavior tests, health check assertions, TCP connection mocking, device validation tests, removed all try/except/pass patterns, eliminated dummy assertions, fixed test parser to use main.py, and completed Pydantic v2 migration. All tests now have meaningful assertions and verify actual behavior.
